channel.title: Researchmodeldata on Xiao-Le Deng (邓小乐)
channel.description: Recent content in Researchmodeldata on Xiao-Le Deng (邓小乐)

item.title: ECMWF—欧洲中期天气预报中心
item.description: 1. Introduction 欧洲中期天气预报中心（European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts 简称 ECMWF）是一个包括34个国家支持的国际性组织，是当今全球独树一帜的国际性天气预报研究和业务机构。其前身为欧洲的一个科学与技术合作项目。1975年ECMWF正式成立，总部设在英国的Bracknell。——欧洲中期天气预报中心-百度百科 主页：ECMWF | Advancing global NWP through international collaboration 数据： https://www.ecmwf.int/en/forecasts/datasets 开放数据： https://www.ecmwf.int/en/about/media-centre/news/2020/ecmwf-moves-towards-policy-open-data ECMWF | Charts 2. References 欧洲中期天气预报中心-百度百科

item.title: GEMMA
item.description: 1. Introduction Home: http://gocedata.como.polimi.it/ 2. Reference Reguzzoni, M., & Sampietro, D. (2015). GEMMA: An Earth crustal model based on GOCE satellite data. International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation, 35, 31-43. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jag.2014.04.002

item.title: LITHO1.0: Crust and Lithospheric model of the Earth
item.description: 1. Introduction Home: https://igppweb.ucsd.edu/~gabi/litho1.0.html 2. Reference Pasyanos, M.E., T.G. Masters, G. Laske, and Z. Ma (2014). LITHO1.0: An updated crust and lithospheric model of the Earth, J. Geophys. Res., 119 (3), 2153-2173. https://doi.org/10.1002/2013JB010626

item.title: GlobeLand30
item.description: 1. Introduction GlobeLand30是中国研制的30米空间分辨率全球地表覆盖数据。 主页： http://www.globallandcover.com/home.html?type=data 下载： http://www.globallandcover.com/defaults.html?src=https://www.xiaoledeng.com/Scripts/map/defaults/download.html&head=download&type=data 2. Reference Jun, C., Ban, Y., & Li, S. (2014). Open access to Earth land-cover map. Nature, 514(7523), 434-434. https://doi.org/10.1038/514434c Chen, J., & Chen, J. (2018). GlobeLand30: Operational global land cover mapping and big-data analysis. Science China Earth Sciences, 61(10), 1533-1534. , https://doi.org/10.1007/s11430-018-9255-3

item.title: GLC_FCS30-2020: Global Land Cover with Fine Classification System at 30m in 2020
item.description: 1. Introduction 反映了2020年全球陆地区域（除南极洲）在30米空间分辨率下的地表覆盖分布状况。 Download: https://zenodo.org/record/4280923#.X8XQ0cszb0o 2. Reference https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/UquWIWnd9kZfISbyYJxr_Q

item.title: CRUST1.0: Global Crustal Model at 1x1 Degrees
item.description: 1. Introduction Crustal Model CRUST1 page Crustal Model CRUST2 page CRUST5.1 2. Reference Laske, G., Masters., G., Ma, Z. and Pasyanos, M., Update on CRUST1.0 - A 1-degree Global Model of Earth’s Crust, Geophys. Res. Abstracts, 15, Abstract EGU2013-2658, 2013.

item.title: CLAS: Chinese Lithospheric model derived from Aeromagnetic data and Satellite models
item.description: 1. Introduction Abstract from Jiang et al. (2020): We present new regional models, denoted CLAS (Chinese Lithospheric model derived from Aeromagnetic data and Satellite models), of the Chinese lithospheric field, combining the long wavelength information provided by satellite-derived models: CHAOS-6, MF7, LCS-1 and NGDC720, and an extremely high-quality compilation of 97994 aeromagnetic survey data with 10km × 10km resolution for shorter wavelength. 2. Reference Jiang, Y., Holme, R., Xiong, S. Q.

item.title: MERIT DEM: Multi‐Error‐Removed Improved‐Terrain DEM
item.description: 1. Introduction The MERIT DEM was developed by removing multiple error components (absolute bias, stripe noise, speckle noise, and tree height bias) from the existing spaceborne DEMs (SRTM3 v2.1 and AW3D-30m v1). It represents the terrain elevations at a 3sec resolution (-90m at the equator), and covers land areas between 90N-60S, referenced to EGM96 geoid. Download: http://hydro.iis.u-tokyo.ac.jp/~yamadai/MERIT_DEM/ 2. Reference Yamazaki, D., Ikeshima, D., Tawatari, R., Yamaguchi, T., O’Loughlin, F., Neal, J.

item.title: SRTM2gravity: Global Gravimetric Terrain Corrections Models
item.description: 1. Introduction Data: http://ddfe.curtin.edu.au/models/SRTM2gravity2018 2. Reference Hirt, C., Yang, M., Kuhn, M., Bucha, B., Kurzmann, A., & Pail, R. (2019). SRTM2gravity: an ultrahigh resolution global model of gravimetric terrain corrections. Geophysical Research Letters, 46(9), 4618-4627. https://doi.org/10.1029/2019GL082521
